author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text: ❤️❤️❤️ Huge Congratz @run_testground team!!! This is an epic milestone for the testing of a whole generation of P2P and Distributed Systems. I'm incredibly proud of everyone and for this delivery in record time! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
